summary: Completed backend testing for Phase 10B-rem Performance Optimization. All N+1 query pattern fixes verified successfully. All 22 endpoints tested return correct response structures without errors.
passed_tests: Report shipment with vendor_id filter works correctly
Dashboard Analytics returns object with weeklyThroughput, vendorLeadTimes, defectRates, productCompletion, shipmentStatus, deadlineDistribution
Vendor Material Inspections returns array with shipment_number, items, accessory_items fields
PO Items returns enriched array with total_sent_to_vendor and remaining_qty_to_vendor fields
PO Items Produced returns 400 error when po_id missing
PO Items Produced returns array when po_id provided
Financial Recap returns object with total_sales_value, total_vendor_cost, gross_margin, invoices, payments
Products legacy compatibility (no page param returns array)
Production POs pagination envelope works correctly
Distribusi Kerja returns object with hierarchy, flat, invalid_records keys
